title: clerodendrum × speciosum
intro: Clerodendrum × speciosum, also known as the Glory Bower, is a flowering plant that is a hybrid of the Clerodendrum speciosum and Clerodendrum thomsoniae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum × speciosum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
